data.description:
## Why
rebar P6 flags a MISSING verify command; it does not catch a PRESENT command that silently lies. A mechanically-checkable subset is a natural DET-floor addition next to P6 (polyglot, fail-open, coverage-recording).

## What
Add a DET check over AC Verify: lines / verify_commands flagging: pure file-inspection with no assertion (grep/find/ls/wc/cat/head alone), unanchored-grep patterns, unquoted shell metacharacters. Must be language-agnostic and fail-open: a line in a stack we cannot parse ABSTAINS (coverage), never false-accuses.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] DET check next to P6 for the mechanically-checkable verify-command defects
- [ ] Fail-open abstain on unparseable/unknown lines, recorded as coverage
- [ ] (LLM-tier depth of this taxonomy lands in WS5 under E6)
data.title: WS4: DET-floor verify-command blacklist (G-3a)
